SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AccessibilityUtils
Utilities for adapting the UI when system-level touch exploration (TalkBack, Switch Access, etc.) is active.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity
Admin screen for browsing and deleting event poster images (US 03.03.01).
AdminBrowseImagesAdapter
Adapter that populates a GridView with event poster images.
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
Activity for administrators to browse and delete all profiles (Entrants and Organizers).
AdminBrowseProfilesAdapter
Adapter to display mixed profiles and handle profile removal.
AdminEventControlScreenActivity
Admin view: list all events from Firestore, search by title (in-memory).
AdminEventControlScreenAdapter
Adapter for AdminEventControlScreenActivity event list.
AdminMainScreenActivity
Admin hub screen that provides navigation to the admin sub-screens: event control, profile browse, image browse, notification log, and admin profile.
AdminNotificationLogControlScreenActivity
Admin notification log screen (US 03.08.01).
AdminNotificationLogControlScreenAdapter
Adapter for AdminProfileControlScreenActivity: Row click will directs to profile detail screen.
AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary
Class is used to temporarily store admin notification item records all the notification information title, message, sender, related event, send time used when displaying admin notification log information screen
AdminProfile
This class holds admin profile fields stored in Firestore at admins/{adminId}.
AdminProfileActivity
Edit the signed-in admin's profile (firstName, lastName, email, optional phone) in Firestore admins/{deviceId}.
AdminProfileControlScreenActivity
Admin screen for browsing and managing entrant/organizer profiles (US 03.02.01, US 03.07.01).
AdminProfileControlScreenAdapter
Adapter for AdminProfileControlScreenActivity: Row click will directs to profile detail screen.
AdminProfileItemTemporary
temporarily store profile information stores either a organizer profile or entrant profile organizers the id stores the organizer id entrants the id stores the device id
BaseActivity
Common base for all Activities in the app.
CancelledListFragment
Lists entrants with status DECLINED or CANCELLED for the current event.
CommentAdapter
Comment list adapter.
CommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
Callback fired when the delete button on a comment row is clicked.
CoOrganizerManagementActivity
Allows the primary organizer of an event to assign or remove co-organizers.
DeviceIdManager
 
Entrant
This class models an entrant (user) profile stored in Firestore at users/{deviceId}.
EntrantHistoryScreenActivity
Entrant history: events this user has joined (has waitingList doc).
EntrantHistoryScreenAdapter
Adapter for EntrantHistoryScreenActivity: events user has joined, with status.
EntrantMainScreenActivity
Entrant home: lists events from Firestore with optional filters (keyword, type, distance, registration open).
EntrantMainScreenAdapter
Adapter for event list on EntrantMainScreenActivity.
EntrantMapActivity
Shows events with coordinates using the same EventFilterCriteria as the home list (registration-open filter when enabled; distance needs location — toast if unavailable).
EntrantNotificationBridge
Single Firestore listener on users/{deviceId}/notifications so organizer-sent notifications (via NotificationHelper) also post as high-importance OS alerts whenever the app process is alive — not only while EntrantMainScreenActivity is on screen.
EntrantNotificationsActivity
Shows in-app notifications from Firestore.
EntrantNotificationsAdapter
List rows for EntrantNotificationsActivity.
EntrantProfileActivity
 
EntrantSetupActivity
 
Event
This class models an event in the Event Lottery app.
EventDetailsActivity
Event details and join/leave waiting list (US 01.01.01, 01.01.02, 01.06.02).
EventEditActivity
Create/edit event screen (US 02.01.01, 02.01.02, 02.01.04, 01.05.05).
EventFilterCriteria
This class holds entrant-side filter criteria for the event list and map screens.
EventFilterDialogFragment
Dialog to edit EventFilterCriteria; posts result on Apply/Clear.
EventFilterUtils
Applies EventFilterCriteria to events, including optional distance from the user.
EventFirestoreParser
Maps Firestore event documents to Event (shared by list + map screens).
EventLocationFragment
 
EventLotteryApp
Registers the notification channel once and attaches the global entrant notification bridge.
EventMapClusterItem
Map marker / cluster leaf for an Event with coordinates.
EventRepository
Singleton holding a "current" event for organizer flows.
FinalList
Lists entrants with status ACCEPTED (those who accepted the invitation) for current event.
GeolocationFragment
 
InAppNotification
This class models one in-app notification row in users/{deviceId}/notifications, written by NotificationHelper when organizers notify entrants.
InvitationInitialFragment
 
InvitationResponseFragment
 
LotteryDraw
 
LotteryRedrawHelper
Randomly promotes one PENDING entrant to SELECTED (same updates as main lottery draw).
MainActivity
This activity is the organizer hub: it hosts NavHostFragment (dashboard, navigation, lottery, waiting, selected).
MyFirebaseMessagingService
Handles FCM token refresh and incoming push messages.
NotificationChannelHelper
Creates and registers the app's notification channel (required on Android 8+).
NotificationHelper
Utility class for sending in-app notifications to entrants.
Organizer
This class models an organizer account stored in Firestore at organizers/{organizerId}.
OrganizerDashboardFragment
Organizer dashboard: lists events where organizerId == deviceId.
OrganizerEventAdapter
RecyclerView adapter for organizer dashboard event cards.
OrganizerInviteEntrantActivity
Lets an organizer search the users collection by name, phone, or email and invite specific entrants to a private event's waiting list (US 02.01.03, 01.05.06).
OrganizerNavigationFragment
 
OrganizerNotificationLogActivity
Shows all notifications sent (automatically by lottery/invite, or manually) for a specific event.
OrganizerProfileActivity
Edit organizer profile (firstName, lastName, email, phone) in Firestore organizers/{deviceId}.
OrganizerSetupActivity
 
QRCodeActivity
Shows event QR code and editable promo code (US 02.01.01).
QRCodeService
Generates QR code bitmaps and human-readable promo codes for events.
SelectedEntryAdapter
 
SelectedEntryAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
 
SelectedList
 
WaitingEntryAdapter
 
WaitingListEntry
This class models one entrant's waiting-list row in Firestore at events/{eventId}/waitingList/{deviceId}.
WaitingListEntry.Status
Lifecycle status of the entrant's application.
WaitingListFragment
 
WelcomePageActivity
